title: Sidhu Moosewala murder: Supreme Court grants bail to Pawan Bishnoi
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday granted bail to Pawan Bishnoi, an accused in the 2022 murder case of Punjabi singer Sidhu Moosewala.A Bench of Justice Vikram Nath and Justice Sandeep Mehta also granted bail to co-accused Jagtar Singh, Moosewala’s neighbour, who is alleged to have helped in the reconnaissance of the singer’s residence.Pawan Bishnoi, who is alleged to be part of Lawrence Bishnoi gang, stands accused of being part of a module that provided logistical support and assisted in the execu
